summary: A CIA information report from a US traveler describes an October 1955 train journey between Baku and Tiflis in the Azerbaijan SSR, during which the source and companions observed a triangular object with three lights near an airfield, illuminated by a searchlight, that reportedly performed spiraling maneuvers before climbing rapidly at a steep angle; a train steward later drew the compartment blinds after apparently being instructed by an accompanying MVD official.
